text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Satsuki Sho, and Mejiro Bright
reflects on her memories of watching Mejiro Ryan
lose this same race in the past.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She remembers how Mejiro Ryan assured her
when they were both little that she could be
confident in herself. She remembers that same
Mejiro Ryan shedding bitter tears after her loss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright heads toward the race, prepared to
"avenge" Mejiro Ryan's loss by using the running
style Ryan taught her.
